nasb.text: When they had seen this, they made known the statement which had been told them about this Child.

esv.text: And when they saw it, they made known the saying that had been told them concerning this child.

cnv.text: 他們見過以後，就把天使對他們論這孩子的話傳開了。

ccb.text: 他们看过之后，就把天使告诉他们有关这婴孩的事传开了。

csbs.text: 他们看见以后，就把天使告诉他们有关这孩子的话传开了。
